texto: I became addicted to the floating nature of nothingness, to the charm of its carefree pauses and to waiting. I magnified waiting. I wrote about waiting. I basked in its warm nook and completely let go of who I am or what I really wanted.
explicacao: Citação de Ibraheem Hamdi sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I became addicted to the floating nature of nothingness, to the charm of its carefree pauses and …” articula reflexao, waiting, became em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

texto: There are certain levels of sadness that introduce you to parts of yourself you never knew existed, and it’s always a much purer version of you that couldn’t be any you-er than you. You fall in love with it and forget to move on.
explicacao: Citação de Ibraheem Hamdi sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “There are certain levels of sadness that introduce you to parts of yourself you never knew existe…” articula reflexao, sadness, there em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

texto: I believe stories have a will of their own, one that surpasses in volition that of their teller. In realms of Storytelling, stories control their bearers, and eventually, their hearers as well.
explicacao: Citação de Ibraheem Hamdi sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I believe stories have a will of their own, one that surpasses in volition that of their teller. …” articula reflexao, stories, storytelling em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como storytelling.
